title: Motherlode Strike Rate
query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN MotherlodeIndicator IS NOT NULL AND MotherlodeIndicator != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS motherlodes FROM ProspectedAsteroid WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate

details.text: {motherlodes} motherlode asteroid(s) identified out of {total} prospected during the report period. Motherlode rocks are the jackpots of core mining — a healthy strike rate means your ring-type selection and scanning technique are consistently finding the premium rocks.
details.help: MotherlodeIndicator is non-null when the prospector flags a core asteroid as a motherlode. motherlodes is the primary metric as the headline find count.

tagLines: Motherlode identification rate calculated. Core mining operational efficiency noted.
Most rocks are empty promises. Motherlodes are the exceptions that make the grind worthwhile.
The prospector limpet called it. You cracked it open. It was worth it. Those are the good sessions.
